introSection: Boomerang Coast to Coaster is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Six Flags Darien Lake in Darien Center, New York, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Boomerang's design is like any other Boomerang model, with a cobra roll and a vertical loop.

fullText:
Boomerang Coast to Coaster is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Six Flags Darien Lake in Darien Center, New York, USA.

Boomerang's design is like any other Boomerang model, with a cobra roll and a vertical loop.
